title: Regret-minimization framework
html:
Regret-minimization framework

Stub. Bezos's decision heuristic — "imagine yourself at 80, which choice do you regret less?" — that Yahir flagged as homework in 2021 10 18 diversification vs concentration: "figure out regret minimization framework model." Adjacent to Yahir's memento mori decision filter — both decide-from-the-future heuristics.

Source summaries

  • 2019 03 14 voice memo 1625 — broker's "best advice to your 18-year-old self" answer
  • 2021 10 18 diversification vs concentration

Connections

  • memento mori decision filter — sibling heuristic
  • buffett vs bezos
  • disconnected from outcome
